steps: File dividend tax refund claim with Danish Tax Administration (Skat) for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on Novo Nordisk dividend
Submit claim using Skat's online form, citing DK-NO tax treaty Article 10 reducing withholding from 25% to 15%
Provide Danske Bank Custody statement showing 25% withholding (DKK 384,000) versus treaty-entitled 15% (DKK 230,400)
Include Norwegian tax residency certificate for CLIENT08 to support treaty benefit eligibility

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
